problem: What substrate allows silicon-level performance in fully flexible electronics?
hypothesis: If Aerogel porosity for thermal/acoustic insulation is applied to fully, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Accelerated degradation study with 29 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
